queue_item.action: Convert OIDC replay rejection into an atomic durable uniqueness decision that remains safe under concurrent submissions.

progress.finding: A replay check must be one atomic unique insertion. A SQLite PRIMARY KEY over the derived issuer-jti replay key with ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING yields exactly one accepted winner while retained.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed; a 32-attempt adversarial batch produced exactly one acceptance and 31 replay rejections.

queue_item.handoff: Cloudflare Research should instantiate one SQLite-backed Durable Object replay namespace, route the protected replay domain to a stable single object identity, invoke acceptReplayOnce only after signed identity acceptance, and block deployment/evidence promotion unless the atomic insert wins. Validate with simultaneous real-runtime requests before claiming concurrency safety.

trust_limit: This additive projection records a tested implementation-ready adapter. It does not prove Cloudflare runtime behavior, workflow integration, peer execution, deployment success, or evidence truth.
